title: Star Wars: Jedi Quest (comic series)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars: Jedi Quest}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:Jquest1.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Jedi Quest'' |writer=[[Ryder Windham]] |penciller=[[Pop Mhan]] |inker=[[Norman Lee]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[David Nestelle]] |cover artist=Pop Mhan |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]]''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]'' |start date=[[September 12]], [[2001]] |end date=[[December 12]], 2001{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54297/star_wars_jedi_quest_2001_4|text=Star Wars: Jedi Quest (2001) #4}} |schedule=Monthly |format=Completed |issues=4 |timeline=[[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Jedi Quest''''' was a four-issue series of comics published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] between [[September 12]], [[2001]] and [[December 12]], 2001. The same story was also told in the [[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (novel series)|Jedi Quest]] series of young adult novels, in the ''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'' special edition. This series has not been collected as a trade paperback, but was eventually collected in ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Menace Revealed]]''. ==Plot summary== {{Plot-link|Jedi Quest: Path to Truth}} ==Continuity== Although the [[2001]] [[:Category:Young Readers|young reader]] novel ''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'' depicts [[Rashtah]] with a scar running through his [[Eye/Legends|eye]] and wearing an [[Eye patch/Legends|eye patch]],''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'' in the comic series he is depicted with both eyes intact.[[Jedi Quest 1|''Jedi Quest'' 1]][[Jedi Quest 3|''Jedi Quest'' 3]][[Jedi Quest 4|''Jedi Quest'' 4]] Another contradicting detail is the [[Colicoid diplomatic ship]], which is depicted in the comics as a standard [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]],[[Jedi Quest 2|''Jedi Quest'' 2]] yet in ''Path to Truth'' is stated to be a typical [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoid]]-designed starship. At the end of the [[Jedi Quest 4|last issue]] of the series, when [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Palpatine's transport|transport]] arrives on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] is still in her "Zora" outfit along with the facial markings and the greased hair, although in the same scene depicted in ''Path to Truth'' she wears a simple tunic instead and has her face and hair cleaned. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Jedi Quest (comic series)}} ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" width="24%" align="center"|Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" width="24%" align="center"|Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" width="24%" align="center"|Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
